description: Explicit cast changes the Rust type mapping while preserving nullability

columns.name: big_id
columns.note: cast to bigint changes type to i64, non-nullable because id is NOT NULL

name: explicit_cast
query_sql:
-- @name GetUserBigId
-- @returns :one
SELECT id::bigint AS big_id FROM users WHERE id = $1
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, bio TEXT, age INTEGER, score NUMERIC, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now())
